Title: Genetic characterization of a locus responsible for low pungency using EMS-induced mutants in Capsicum annuum L.

Common_Genes.Applied_Species_Variety: Yuwolcho; Lam32; Micro-Pep Red; mutant lines 221-2-1a and 1559-1-2h
Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Genetic locus; causal gene not fully proven
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Single recessive mutant locus causing extremely low pungency and drastically reduced capsaicinoid content
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Pun4 is a novel locus defined by two allelic EMS mutants, 221-2-1a and 1559-1-2h, both showing extremely low pungency. 2. Pun4 mapped to chromosome 6 and behaves as one major locus with possible minor modifiers. 3. Integrated mapping and transcriptome evidence suggests Pun4 affects the branched-chain fatty acid side of capsaicinoid biosynthesis, likely through regulation of DEMF06G16460 or related genes.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Allelism tests; genetic segregation analysis in F1/F2/F3 populations; linkage mapping; fine-mapping; BSA-seq/MutMap; BSR-seq/QTL-seq; RNA-seq; WGCNA; HPLC phenotyping
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Inferred through widespread downregulation of capsaicinoid biosynthetic genes in low-pungency mutants
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Fruit developmental stage; genetic background differences
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful locus for developing low-pungency pepper cultivars; molecular identity and causal regulatory mechanism still need validation before deployment
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: Whole-genome sequencing/BSA-seq; RNA-seq; QTL-seq/BSR-seq; PacBio HiFi assembly (all available on request)
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Pun4 is not allelic to Pun1, Pun3, pAMT, or CaKR1 based on sequencing and allelism tests; causal lesion may be noncoding or trans-acting rather than coding.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: 3-ketoacyl-CoA synthase; condensing enzyme of very-long-chain fatty acid elongation
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Branched-chain fatty acid / fatty acid elongation associated branch contributing to capsaicinoid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Fatty acid elongation / branched-chain fatty acid supply branch of capsaicinoid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Catalyzes condensation of an acyl-CoA starter with malonyl-CoA in a fatty acid elongation cycle, proposed to help generate branched-chain fatty acid precursors for capsaicinoid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Lower expression of DEMF06G16460 is associated with extremely low pungency and strongly reduced capsaicinoid accumulation; proposed as the strongest candidate for Pun4
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Pun4 was mapped to chromosome 6 and integrated mapping/transcriptome analyses prioritized DEMF06G16460 as the strongest candidate gene. 2. DEMF06G16460 encodes a putative 3-ketoacyl-CoA synthase and is highly expressed in WT placenta across fruit development but reduced in the low-pungency mutant. 3. The study proposes that reduced activity/expression of this KCS homolog limits fatty acid-derived precursor supply for capsaicinoid biosynthesis, causing low pungency.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Genetic mapping; fine-mapping; MutMap/BSA-seq; RNA-seq differential expression; WGCNA co-expression analysis; HPLC metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Highly expressed in WT placenta at 14, 21, 28, 35, and 42 DPA
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: High in WT fruit placenta throughout development; reduced in mutant 221-2-1a
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Proposed key control candidate for Pun4; not definitively established as rate-limiting
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate target for breeding or editing low-pungency peppers by reducing expression/function; should be validated because causal mutation was not proven in coding sequence and regulatory effects may be involved
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Whole-genome sequencing/BSA-seq (data available on request); RNA-seq (data available on request); PacBio HiFi genome assembly (data available on request)
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: No confirmed coding-sequence EMS mutation was found in this gene; authors suggest Pun4 may act through long-distance cis-regulation or trans-regulatory factors affecting DEMF06G16460 and related fatty acid-pathway genes.
